summary: LMS and Events API testing completed. Backend APIs: 14/15 passed (1 skipped). Frontend: App loads with password protection, complex onboarding flow with modals. LMS portals accessible via backend only (localhost:8001).

integration_issues.issue: LMS admin portal at /lms-admin/ and learner portal at /training/ are only accessible via localhost:8001 backend, not through the external preview URL due to Kubernetes ingress routing (/api prefix required for backend routes)

issues: Multiple modal dialogs (password, permissions, DOB) create friction for first-time users - may want to streamline

action_items: LMS portals (admin/learner) need routing fix - currently only accessible via localhost:8001, not through preview URL
Consider adding /api prefix routes for LMS portals or exposing them via frontend routing
critical_code_review_comments: EventsSection component returns null when no events or while loading - could show skeleton loader
LMS portals use API_URL = window.location.origin which won't work when accessed via /api routes

success_rate.frontend: 80% (app loads, onboarding works, LMS portals need routing fix)

seed_data_creation: Created test volunteer registrations during API testing (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend LMS APIs all working correctly. Frontend app loads with password protection. LMS admin/learner portals are static HTML served from backend at /lms-admin/ and /training/ but only accessible via localhost:8001 due to ingress routing. Events section should display on home page after onboarding modals are dismissed.

backend_tests_passed: POST /api/events/{id}/join - Can join any scheduled event (time-gate removed)
backend_tests_skipped: POST /api/events/{cancelled_id}/join - No cancelled events to test
frontend_tested: Date of Birth modal (requires dropdown selection)

lms_portals_status.external_access: NOT accessible via preview URL (routing issue)
